---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Puku CLI.
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the pain point.

## Proposed solution

What would you like Puku CLI to do?

## Who it helps

Who benefits, and how often do they hit this issue?

## Prior art

Links, screenshots, or recordings of similar solutions.

## Provider specifics (if any)

Note if this only applies to certain providers or models.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps us evaluate the request.

> Do not include API keys, access tokens, auth cookies, or sensitive data.
